arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich plan for Jonas Urbig to join a three way battle for the #2 goalkeeper role
arts.sum: At this point, there have been countless rumors about Bayern Munich ’s determination to sign Jonas Urbig, with the latest rumors suggesting the Bavarians have moved their plan to sign the FC Köln goalkeeper forward to January due to Daniel Peretz’s injury. Are Bayern Munich planning to finish the final months of the season with four senior goalkeepers?

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich had informal talks with Liverpool
arts.sum: According to a report from Tz journalists Philipp Kessler and Vinzent Tschirpke (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Liverpool FC wants to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich — and has already made contact via informal talks with the 29-year-old: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.
VfL Wolfsburg have announced the signing of Danish international Andreas Skov Olsen.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Package deal? Are Jamal Musiala and Alphonso Davies teaming up in talks with Bayern Munich?; Agent wants to make things difficult for Bayern after Uli Hoeneß slight per report; Checking out Sum 41; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: However, Davies’ agent (Nick Huoseh)— who has been a handful for Bayern Munich to deal with so far — trying to play his client’s offer off of Musiala is a bit of dirty pool given how different their respective positions are valued. Two of the most important contract situations at the moment for Bayern Munich involve Jamal Musiala and Alphonso Davies.
League leaders Bayern Munich will be taking on Wolfsburg on Saturday at the Allianz Arena for matchday 18 in the Bundesliga. Vincent Kompany’s side are four points clear at the…

arts.ttl: Official | Wolfsburg sign Andreas Skov Olsen from Club Brugge
arts.sum: VfL Wolfsburg officially unveiled Andreas Skov Olsen as a new signing on Friday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich opening up to possibility of release clause for Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich might be opening up to the possibility of a release clause for Jamal Musiala. Bayern are said to be willing to make concessions regarding a release clause – for the first time.

arts.ttl: Club open talks to sign Brentford defender – Suitable loan move being sought
arts.sum: Mads Roerslev has been a regular for Brentford this season. He’s played 21 times in all competitions, starting the last four games in the Premier League under Thomas Frank. Despite being an important part of the side, Roerslev had drawn links with a move to Udinese some days ago. There was a suggestion that the The post Club open talks to sign Brentford defender – Suitable loan move being sought appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany dismisses talk of poor performances from Leroy Sané after dazzling display against Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Sané is not perfect but Kompany appreciates the positive qualities he brings even in his worst performances. But why did Kompany start Sané again?

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich keeper Hoffmann gets chewed up and spat out by Schalke within six months, is replaced by Loris Karius
arts.sum: Neuer recommended the move to him, Hoffmann was promised the starting role in goal for a massive club like Schalke and it seemed Hoffmann could finally start realizing his dream of playing in the Bundesliga. The club quickly broke their promise, backup goalkeeper Justin Heekeren was preferred to Hoffmann and the team started the season with relegation form.
